provenanceNote: Hypothetical policy scenarios for what-if analysis. Not predictions. Current regime reflects published rates as of March 2026.

regimes.label: Current Policy (2026)
regimes.description: Published tariff schedules as of March 2026. Section 301 + reciprocal tariffs active.

regimes.label: US Tariff Relief
regimes.description: Hypothetical scenario: Section 301 reduced to 25%, reciprocal tariffs halved, AD/CVD reduced for cooperating firms.

regimes.label: Trade Escalation
regimes.description: Hypothetical scenario: US raises all China tariffs to 100%, reciprocal tariffs doubled, India raises module duty to 60%.
